overall.description: A cinematic shot of a medieval Gothic dining hall from a video game, featuring stone arches, wooden tables, floating candles, and warm torchlight. A character in dark robes walks through the atmospheric interior while the camera remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval dining hall with floating candles and Gothic architecture

events.description: character in dark robes enters from the left side of the frame
character exits the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the hall interior from a fixed position

notable_agents.action: walking across the hall from left to right, passing by the wooden tables

entered.detail: Gothic stone archway with pointed top and carved details
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm orange light
long wooden dining tables with benches arranged in rows
magical candles suspended in mid-air providing illumination
large hanging banner with heraldic design on the far wall
dark wooden door with metal studs on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static shot of a medieval Gothic dining hall illuminated by floating candles and wall sconces. A character in dark robes enters from the left and walks across the stone floor, passing wooden dining tables before exiting to the right. The atmospheric interior features stone arches, a large tapestry, and warm magical lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, atmospheric gaze across a medieval Gothic dining hall as a solitary figure traverses the space. It begins with a static view of the stone interior, where floating candles and wall sconces cast a warm, magical glow over the architecture. As a character in dark robes enters from the left, the focus shifts to their movement across the stone floor and past heavy wooden dining tables. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding stone arches and a large tapestry before the figure finally exits the frame to the right.
